description: Play sounds together of different lengths with offset start
evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace contains a play_together block with multiple play_sequential blocks that contain rests to offset the start of tracks
Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/synth_track_1"
  play_sequential
    rest 1 measure
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
  play_sequential
    rest 1 measure
    rest 1 measure
    play "pack/bass_track_3"
    play "pack/bass_track_3"
```
    ","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains a play_together block with multiple play blocks and exactly one play_sequential block that contains a rest block and to offset the start of a track

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/synth_track_1"
  play_sequential
    rest 2 measures
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains at least one rest block inside a play_together block, but is not sequenced correctly to offset the start of a new track

Example:
```
play_together
  rest 1 measure
  play "pack/drums_track 1"
  play "pack/drums_track_2"
  play "pack/drums_track_2"
```

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  rest 1 measure
  play_sequential
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
    play "pack/drums_track_2"
```}
